disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central crushing chest tightness that came on with physical exertion (carrying groceries)
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what the chest feeling is like and what you were doing when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a crushing, heavy weight right in the middle of my chest. It hit me while I was carrying the shopping in.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest discomfort spread up into the left jaw
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain move or spread anywhere?
Do you feel it in your arm, neck or jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — it spread up into my left jaw.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Discomfort only partially eased after 20 minutes of rest and a dull ache persists
trigger_question_examples: Has it gone away completely or is something still there?
How long did it last and did resting help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Sitting down helped a bit after about 20 minutes, but I've still got a dull ache that won't go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent milder exertional chest tightness over the preceding two weeks
trigger_question_examples: Have you had anything like this before in the last few weeks?
Is this the first time or has it been building up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I've had a few milder tight feelings over the last couple of weeks when I pushed myself, but nothing this bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Father died of a heart attack at a young age, with a strong family pattern of very high cholesterol and early heart attacks
trigger_question_examples: Does anyone in your family have heart problems?
Any family history of high cholesterol or early heart attacks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My dad died of a heart attack at about the age I am now, and there's a lot of really high cholesterol and early heart attacks in my family.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked generalised fatigue accompanying the chest discomfort
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any other symptoms with it — tiredness, sweatiness, nausea, breathlessness?
How did you feel in yourself during the episode?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I felt really wiped out and drained when it hit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Firm, non-tender lumps at the back of both ankles (over the heel cords) noticed over time
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever noticed any firm lumps on your tendons — for example at the back of your ankles or on your knuckles?
Any hard swellings around your heels or knuckles you've had for a while?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Actually yes — I've got firm lumps at the back of both ankles. I never thought much of them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Yellowish soft patches on the skin of both upper eyelids
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any yellowish patches or bumps on your skin, especially around your eyelids?
Any yellowish marks near your eyes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do have some yellowish patches on my eyelids, yeah.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any regular medication, including nothing for cholesterol
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications, including anything for your cholesterol?
Has anyone ever put you on a cholesterol tablet or statin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on anything at all — nothing for cholesterol.
